h211b043ag4371g403dgb871g33139233c6bf: Those blasted dreams. They're getting more... insistent. I'm almost surprised I managed to wake.

h967ff2eeg5f9dg40ddg89feg8a0158be46fe: They also invite the ghaik into our minds for a veritable feast.
hd52b9d00g4958g4941gbc3eg6873df22e0e3: Indeed. In extraordinary times, we should take every advantage we can get.
h1e180bc4g4b5fg412dgb4dageec9032c28c5: Besides - it was a mistake, right? We mustn't let it divide us.

h2e99a4a5g1b05g4c65g9ee5g05af74ffb121: If your trust is so shaken, Shadowheart, you might go your own way. I'd find a way to work through the pain.

h94980ec9gfe31g4848g8661g457cdfe93ce0: A shadowed heart is not a forgiving heart then? I'll remember that when it's you who makes the next mistake.
